programmes.show_description: The Kitchen: Amanda and Alan brace themselves to tackle the heart of the B&B - the kitchen. Big plans are afoot with a Spanish-tiled extravaganza, but neither can agree on a colour scheme.
The Master Suite: Amanda and Alan go all out designing a Moorish-themed master bedroom, but they struggle to see eye to eye in a debate over keeping a statement curved arch.
A revelation shocks the family and sends Nic spiralling into panic. Have her worst fears come true? Is everything unravelling, or will she get away with murder?
Programmes start at 19:00.
Madonna fails a friend. Desi can't let go. Chris' ruthlessness leads to tragedy.
Remi is on his bike, in the driveway. Eden rails against his decision to ride.
It's the quarter-final and the teams create illusion desserts and a Singapore ice cream sandwich, before they combine sugar and chocolate in a spectacular theme park showpiece.
Master builder Harrison Gardner helps people take on the challenge of constructing or renovating their own homes, beginning with Dublin couple Grace and Robbie.
Mum's Bad Tooth: Rachel is maybe too keen to befriend their new neighbours, and Paul is determined to prove he's not boring.
Emma (21) from Limerick meets James (21) from Louth, who doesn't drink coffee because he has 'enough energy as it is'. Will sparks fly between them?
Erin and co are excited to attend an outdoor pursuits weekend as part of a peace initiative.
Empty Nest: NCIS searches for a missing undercover agent in the midst of an active hostage situation.
Ruth's love for baby Fia is undeniable. But under the strain of loneliness and a difficult domestic existence, the mother impulsively makes a drastic decision.
Maia: Bruised by his encounter with Nicola, Danny goes to The Crimson Orchid gentlemen's club to look for Maia, who Nicola has accused of corrupting Christina.
Jaisal: Against Maia's advice, Danny goes alone to meet with Christina's supplier, who is revealed to be Jaisal Batra, a corrupt former police officer turned club owner.
Programmes start at 19:00.
TK severs ties with Chris. Madonna lets a friend go. Viv hires a dud.
Lacey is starting to feel like her old safe again following the positive AVO outcome, but Cash reminds her to remain vigilant.
Who Dares Dare Hudaro: After falling under the spell of a visiting hypnotist, Mark's grades begin to suffer.
Kent: In Kent, the 'garden of England', Rick Stein harvests English cherries at a family-run farm.
Glasgow: Rick Stein delves into Glasgow's multicultural food scene, tucking into Korean and Pakistani dishes and finding out how Italian food became part of the city's fabric.
Spain's Big Bang: Eva Longoria explores Spain's rapid culinary evolution from basic food traditions to worldwide gastronomic influence within a single generation.
Caught in limbo for years in Ireland's immigration system, a young Nigerian woman develops a friendship with an employee who she meets at one of the accommodation centres.
